description_for_human: Retrieve similar past decisions, evidence, objections, who-was-right, and risk before approving a decision.
description_for_model: Analyzes a proposed organizational decision against historical decision memory using a four-signal evidence model with confidence and abstention. Returns similar decisions with citations, the who-was-right ledger, risk assessment, and recommended mitigations.

functions.name: analyzeDecision
functions.description: Analyze a proposed decision or meeting transcript and return grounded similar decisions, who-was-right, risk, and recommendations.

functions.name: listDecisions
functions.description: List decisions in organizational memory with risk and confidence.
